chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constt: Petition.No.D-29 of 2022. _________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ___________________________________________________ Before: Mr. Justice Irshad Ali Shah, Mr. Justice Agha Faisal, 01. For orders on M.A.No.170/2022 (U/A). 02. For orders on office objection “A”. 03. For orders on M.A.No.171/2022 (E/A). 04. For hearing of main case. 02.02.2022 Mr. Raja Muhammad Amjad Khan, Advocate for the petitioner. = * = * = * = * = * = 1. Urgency granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Granted subject to all just exception. 4. The petitioner by way of instant constitutional petition has sought for restraint against the private respondents from raising construction over the encroached property, with restoration of its possession and registration of FIR against them for making such encroachment. The issue of encroachment over public property and restoration of its possession with registration of FIR for such encroachment, involving factual controversy, could not be resolved by this Court in exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction. Consequently, the instant constitutional petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine. JUDGE JUDGE.
